name: Electra Battery Materials Corporation
description: Electra Battery Materials Corporation, formerly known as First Cobalt Corp., is a Canadian processor of low-carbon, ethically-sourced battery materials. The company is focused on building North America's only fully integrated battery materials park, which will refine cobalt, nickel, and recycle black mass from lithium-ion batteries. Located in Ontario, Canada, Electra's facility aims to provide sustainable, traceable, and localized raw materials to the North American electric vehicle supply chain.
